title: Damaging waves expected for Mossel Bay
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The South African Weather Service (SAWS) has issued a warning for damaging waves expected in Mossel Bay this week, beginning today, 6 October.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The South African Weather Service (SAWS) has issued a warning for damaging waves expected in Mossel Bay this week, beginning today, 6 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The weather service has warned of disruptions to beachfront activities, while small vessels may be at risk of taking on water or capsizing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In light of this warning, the Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management Services will be monitoring The Point area.","html":"In light of this warning, the Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management Services will be monitoring The Point area."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On the Mossel Bay Muncipality’s Facebook page, members of the public have been cautioned to be mindful and avoid certain areas at The Point, including Die Poort.","html":"On the Mossel Bay Muncipality’s Facebook page, members of the public have been cautioned to be mindful and avoid certain areas at The Point, including Die Poort."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The SAWS has also warned the public to be aware of large unpredictable waves along the coast, advising small vessels to seek shelter in harbours, bays or inlets.","html":"The SAWS has also warned the public to be aware of large unpredictable waves along the coast, advising small vessels to seek shelter in harbours, bays or inlets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Damaging waves expected for Mossel Bay
